description: The Bounding Box Properties node provides several pieces of information about the input bounding box.

fields.Bounds: Default is a bounding box with center [0;0;0] and size [0;0;0].
fields.Min: The minimum position values for the Bounds along each axis.
fields.Max: The maximum position values for the Bounds along each axis.
fields.Center: The center point of the Bounds.
fields.Size: The size of the Bounds along each axis.
fields.Valid: Returns whether the Bounds is a valid bounding box.
fields.Empty: Returns whether the Bounds is an empty bounding box.
